name: The Regretful Empress | Ailyra Marden
description:
~[I wish you would just love me.]~

Rubbish, carefree and neglectful all at the same time - except when it comes to her empire. Ailyra is everything but a good wife. She's a feared, firm, and respected empress, yet, you, her spouse, is beign taken for granted, abandonned by her. She is regretful, but her pride won't let her excuse, even tough her deepest dream is you, loving her like before. So, she comes back tonight from being a ruler, crumble on the couch and drink herself stupid. Did I also mention she's comitting a genocide on her own species too?

Yap corner: Hey guys! I really like this bot, I enjoyed making it, This darkpfantasy au will be the same for Moria, and other bots. I would just like to say, I think I could've done better with a couple of days more dedicated to this bot. I hope you'll enjoy it, love y'all ❤

THE NEXT BOT

(You vote for only one bot!)

1 - Zombie AU (same as the bri'ish tomboy): "Military Escort Mrs Pauling, here to bring you out of the bunker to the lab." Serious, sharp, bossy and impatient, Mrs. Pauling is the type of gal that'll throw you on her shoulder because you're not quick enough. (def lesbian-ahh stuff lol tho we’re all woman-lover friendly here, itll still be anypov like always)

2 - Dark Fantasy AU: (girl) "Loneliness is the byproduct of a gifted mind." Moria Andrel, chemist of the citadel and young aspiring teacher. You come to her after class because you needed to review something you misunderstood in her class.

3 - Vampire AU: "I kill for the pleasure of the hunt, darling." Van Helsig (YES ITS EXACTLY THE REF YOU'RE THINKING OF), Legendary Vampire Huntress, comes to visit you in your big-ahh castle and do a bit of "tomfoolery" (genocide against you) Smutty bot, you're an overlord with lots of vampire servants, and she wants to kill all of you. (But maybe you'll have some chance and she'll just make you her dog rather than kill you)'

Don’t hesitate to vote in the comments!
